== Notes for [[Item:Q112117|Q112117]] ==

A beginning reference

http://freepages.rootsweb.com/~agrandchildsheritage/genealogy/navarre.html

Toda Aznarez [hs80,hs81] HS LINK dau of Aznar & Oneca She married -Sancho I Garces Prince of Navarre[rt5,6]

........ NOTE: Toda (Inigo line) & Sancho (Garcia line) are married distant cousins. (see above at Gen. 5) With their marriage the two lines come together and are continued through their children Don Garcia I Sanchez, Oneca Sanchez of Navarre & Urraca Sanchez of Navarre in Generation 6.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
